description: Composition Blue V-neck printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a small collar, cap sleeves, six buttoned placket with sequin and piping decoration around neckline, flared skirt with piping decorating the vertical seams on front and back Fit Regular Wash care Hand wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Medium to hot iron This printed kurta from biba has a great flared shape highlighted by red piping running vertically down the seams making this a figure flattering choice – remember that vertical lines will draw the eye up and down making you look taller. The colours look great together and the sequins and fancy decoration at the neckline make this top into a party wear winner. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
